wine_retailers.name: VinosRibera.com Gourmet and Tasting Centre
wine_retailers.address: Ctra. N-1 Km. 153.5, 09471 Fuentespina, Burgos, Spain
wine_retailers.description: Self-described largest representative centre of DO Ribera del Duero wines and gastronomic products. Over 100 wineries from the denomination represented; climate-controlled cellar; tasting area; gourmet food products.
wine_retailers.specialist_focus: DO Ribera del Duero multi-producer; also Rueda, Cigales and Castilla y Leon DOs

verified.address_quoted: Ctra. N-1, km. 153,5 (Exit 152-153 A-1), 09471 Fuentespina - Burgos, Spain

wine_retailers.name: Enoteca Agropal
wine_retailers.description: Wine retail shop in a renovated 1953 grain silo on the Pesquera road in Penafiel. DO Ribera del Duero and other Castilla y Leon designations; adjacent gourmet supermarket with Iberian products, cheeses and regional specialities.
wine_retailers.specialist_focus: DO Ribera del Duero and Castilla y Leon; gourmet regional products

wine_retailers.name: Vinoteca y Artesania Zaguan
wine_retailers.address: Plaza Espana s/n, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain
wine_retailers.description: Wine shop near the Plaza del Coso in central Penafiel. Over 450 references from DO Ribera del Duero, Rueda, Cigales, Toro and Tierra de Castilla y Leon; wine accessories and traditional regional food products.
wine_retailers.specialist_focus: DO Ribera del Duero and Castilla y Leon multi-appellation

wine_retailers.name: Bodega Historica Don Carlos Wine Shop
wine_retailers.address: C/ Isilla s/n, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos, Spain
wine_retailers.description: Wine retail attached to the Bodega Historica Don Carlos underground cellar tour venue in the centre of Aranda de Duero. Wide variety of small-producer Ribera del Duero wines available to purchase; accessible retail after the underground cave tour.
wine_retailers.specialist_focus: Small-producer DO Ribera del Duero; artisan producers from across the zone

verified.address_quoted: C. Isilla, Aranda de Duero, Burgos

wine_retailers.name: Bodegas Felix Callejo Estate Shop
wine_retailers.address: Avenida del Cid Km. 16, 09441 Sotillo de la Ribera, Burgos, Spain
wine_retailers.description: Cellar-door retail at Bodegas Felix Callejo in Sotillo de la Ribera. Full range of Callejo estate wines including Flores de Callejo, Callejo Crianza, Reserva and the single-parcel Majuelos de Callejo; also available for online order.
wine_retailers.specialist_focus: Callejo estate wines; old-vine single-parcel Tempranillo

verified.address_quoted: Avenida del Cid, Km. 16, 09441 Sotillo de la Ribera, Burgos, Espana

wine_retailers.name: Bodegas Emilio Moro Estate Shop
wine_retailers.address: Ctra. Penafiel-Vitoria s/n, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_retailers.description: Cellar-door retail at Bodegas Emilio Moro on the Golden Mile. Full estate range from La Revelia joven to La Felisa single-vineyard; available to purchase after winery visits or directly at the estate shop.
wine_retailers.specialist_focus: Emilio Moro estate wines; single-vineyard Tempranillo from the Golden Mile

verified.address_quoted: Ctra. Penafiel-Vitoria, S/N, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid

wine_retailers.name: Bodegas Protos Gourmet Shop
wine_retailers.address: C/ Bodegas Protos 24-28, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain
wine_retailers.description: Estate shop in the Agora of the Richard Rogers-designed Bodegas Protos complex in Penafiel. Full Protos range including limited releases; wine accessories, local food products and the Protos cookbook.
wine_retailers.specialist_focus: Bodegas Protos estate wines; DO Ribera del Duero accessories and gifts

wine_retailers.name: Bodegas Portia Gourmet Shop
wine_retailers.address: Antigua Carretera Nacional 1 Km. 170, 09370 Gumiel de Izan, Burgos, Spain
wine_retailers.description: Gourmet shop within the Norman Foster Bodegas Portia complex in Gumiel de Izan. Full Portia range including Triennia, Summa, Crianza and Roble; wine accessories and Ribera del Duero artisan products.
wine_retailers.specialist_focus: Portia estate wines; Ribera del Duero artisan products

verified.address_quoted: Antigua Carretera Nacional 1 Km. 170, 09370 Gumiel de Izan, Burgos, Spain

wine_retailers.name: Consejo Regulador Ribera del Duero Tienda
wine_retailers.address: C/ Hospital 6, 09300 Roa de Duero, Burgos, Spain
wine_retailers.description: The regulatory council of DO Ribera del Duero in Roa de Duero, located in the 16th-century Hospital de San Juan Bautista building. The council office maintains an information and promotional retail point for the denomination; direct source for DO registry information.
wine_retailers.specialist_focus: DO Ribera del Duero information and select promotional bottles; regulatory reference for the designation

wine_retailers.name: Bodegas Arzuaga Navarro Estate Shop
wine_retailers.address: Carretera N-122 Km 325, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid, Spain
wine_retailers.description: Estate retail shop at Hotel and Spa Arzuaga on the Golden Mile. Full Arzuaga portfolio from young Roble to aged Gran Reserva and single-vineyard Finca La Planta; wine and food gifts from the estate.
wine_retailers.specialist_focus: Arzuaga estate wines; Ribera del Duero and La Mancha estate bottles

verified.address_quoted: Carretera N-122, 325, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid
